Interface RuleApplicationManager<G extends @Nullable ProofGoal<G>>

All Superinterfaces:
NewRuleListener
All Known Subinterfaces:
DelegationBasedRuleApplicationManager<G>
All Known Implementing Classes:
FocussedBreakpointRuleApplicationManager, FocussedRuleApplicationManager, QueueRuleApplicationManager
public interface RuleApplicationManager<G extends @Nullable ProofGoal<G>> extends NewRuleListener

This interface provides the next rule application to be applied to the main loop of the prover.

Rule application managers are associated with a specific proof goal. Each proof goal has its own copy of a manager (see copy()).

  • Method Details

    • clearCache

      void clearCache()
      Clear existing caches of applicable rules

    • peekNext

      RuleApp peekNext()
      Returns:
      the first applicable rule app, i.e. the least expensive element of the heap that is not obsolete and caches the result of this operation to save some time the next time the method nextAndCache() or next() is called. A call of next() empties the cache again.

    • next

      RuleApp next()
      Returns:
      the next rule that is supposed to be applied

    • setGoal

      void setGoal(G p_goal)
      Set the goal this is the rule app manager for

    • copy

      RuleApplicationManager<G> copy()
      Copies this rule application manager.
      Returns:
      copy of this manager
